title: Towelogy Bamboo Hand Towels 2-Pack 50x80 cm Premium Quality Soft and Absorbent Towels for Hotel Spa Bathroom | OEKO-TEX CERTIFIED (2, Blue)

features: Premium Quality Softness: Our Bamboo hand towels are crafted with meticulous attention to softness. The combination of 60% bamboo and 40% cotton creates a luxurious texture that feels gentle and comforting against your skin. The bamboo-cotton blend hand towels enhances their durability, ensuring they remain intact and maintain their quality even with frequent usage and washing. Whether you're using them at home or in a commercial setting, these towels are built to last

Optimal Dimensions: Bamboo Hand Towels are available in two sizes to suit your needs: Standard (50x80 cm) and XL (70x120 cm). The Standard size is perfect for everyday use, whether in bathrooms or kitchens, offering quick-drying and absorbent qualities. On the other hand, the XL size provides extra coverage and versatility, making it ideal for beach trips, spa days, or as a luxurious bath sheet, with its softness and high absorbency ensuring maximum comfort and coverage

Efficient Absorbency: These hand towels for bathroom excel in their absorbent capabilities. The bamboo-cotton blend bath towels not only enhances the softness but also amplifies their absorbent properties. Whether you're using them in your hotel, spa, or home bathroom, these hand towels quickly and effectively soak up moisture, leaving your hands feeling dry and refreshed

Thoughtful Eco-Friendliness: With a significant 60% bamboo content, these hand towels are an embodiment of sustainability. Bamboo is a renewable resource that grows rapidly and requires minimal water and pesticides. By choosing these towels, you're making an eco-conscious choice that contributes to reducing your carbon footprint

Unmatched Comfort and Absorbency: Crafted with a blend of 60% bamboo and 40% cotton, these hand towels exhibit superior softness and remarkable absorbency. Enjoy a lavish sensation against your skin while the bamboo-cotton mix efficiently wicks away moisture, leaving you feeling refreshed and dry. Ideal for elevating your hotel, spa, or home bathroom routine
description: Product Description Embrace Luxury, Embrace Bamboo: Your Friendly Towels for Ultimate Comfort In the world of bath linens, bamboo has emerged as a sustainable superstar, revolutionizing the way we think about hand towels. Bamboo Extra Large Hand Towels, available in two convenient sizes (70x120cm and 50x80 cm), are making waves in the realm of bathroom essentials.
